fees.conditions: Carry-on allowance depends on cabin: Economy—1 piece up to 8 kg; Business—2 pieces up to 8 kg each; size limits apply (typically up to 55 × 40 × 23 cm per item)
Checked baggage included under piece or weight concept depending on route; allowance varies by cabin and fare family

fees.amount: Depends on route and baggage concept
fees.conditions: Excess baggage charges apply when exceeding the free allowance; fees vary by route, cabin, and whether the piece or weight concept applies

fees.amount: Depends on route and excess weight
fees.conditions: Checked bags exceeding standard weight limits incur overweight charges; maximum accepted weight per bag is 32 kg

fees.amount: Depends on route, size, and aircraft handling
fees.conditions: Checked bags exceeding standard size limits are subject to oversize charges; acceptance subject to aircraft and airport handling limits
Standard seat selection included for most fares; timing and availability depend on fare family and cabin

fees.amount: Depends on route, seat type, and timing
fees.conditions: Seat selection fees may apply on some Economy fares depending on route, seat type, and time of selection

fees.amount: Depends on fare family and route
fees.conditions: Change and cancellation fees depend on fare family and route; promotional fares are generally the most restrictive
Unaccompanied Minor service available for eligible ages; fees and conditions vary by route and age
